finding_results.notes: Seeded Diego's failed outbound-relay fixation earlier, then made his break follow a fresh family-relay ping plus repeated outbound denial on his pod screen. The attack now reads as a pressured choice against the interface trapping him, not a sudden plot-triggered smash.

The table-building beat now grows out of that operational hypothesis.
